manualGates.evidence: No real EV3 hardware evidence is generated by automated localhost tests.
manualGates.label: Real EV3 classroom rehearsal
manualGates.nextAction: Run the unified stack with a real EV3 brick on ev3dev, record EV3 connection, motor, sensor, AI Quest collection, and multi-device rehearsal results.
manualGates.requirement: Section 13.7 classroom acceptance requires real EV3 bricks when hardware is available, plus teacher rehearsal evidence.

results.evidence: Scratch VM TAP tests for legacy official EV3 fixtures.
results.label: Legacy official EV3 project compatibility
results.requirement: Older `.sb3` projects using legacy official EV3 opcodes map automatically to the complete VSLE-EV3 runtime.

results.label: VSLE-EV3 block surface and AI Quest blocks
results.requirement: EV3 category exposes the complete EV3 hardware and AI Quest block surface with synchronous reporter behavior.
results.stdoutTail:
> @vsle/ev3-extension@0.1.0 test
> node --test tests/*.js

✔ buildConnectionModalModel normalizes WiFi and Bluetooth fields (1.027292ms)
✔ src ui connection modal entry re-exports the runnable implementation (0.164084ms)
✔ renderConnectionModal returns Scratch hardware modal style markup (0.694292ms)
✔ ConnectionModal binds WiFi, Bluetooth, help, cancel, and connect actions (0.942375ms)
✔ register requires unsandboxed TurboWarp extension context (14.541ms)
✔ getInfo exposes complete EV3 and AI Quest blocks in LEGO red (0.515458ms)
✔ AI Quest blocks call the server-side contract and expose sync reporters (0.595375ms)
✔ SensorCache provides default EV3 state and merges partial updates (0.170875ms)
✔ SensorCache normalizes EV3 epoch-second timestamps to milliseconds (0.071167ms)
✔ motor command blocks normalize arguments before sending to WeisileLink (0.441167ms)
✔ invalid motor ports fail closed without sending commands (0.117334ms)
✔ motor reporter and boolean blocks synchronously read sensor cache (0.191375ms)
✔ waitMotorStopped polls cache instead of sending network commands (0.228917ms)
✔ sensor reporter and boolean blocks synchronously read sensor cache (0.641833ms)
✔ sensor command and wait blocks use validated ports and cache polling (0.189042ms)
✔ sound command blocks normalize arguments before sending to WeisileLink (0.4305ms)
✔ display command blocks normalize arguments before sending to WeisileLink (0.284167ms)
✔ system blocks use cache for reporters and normalize commands (4.465667ms)
✔ data collection blocks normalize commands and keep reporters synchronous (0.205334ms)
✔ WeisileLink client sends JSON-RPC 2.0 commands to local Scratch endpoint (0.485042ms)
✔ WeisileLink client stores Scratch Link base64 sensor notifications (0.3275ms)
✔ buildSensorDataPanelModel normalizes cache-backed EV3 state (1.477083ms)
✔ src ui data panel entry re-exports the runnable implementation (0.06775ms)
✔ renderSensorDataPanel returns Scratch-style collapsible panel markup (0.582375ms)
✔ renderSensorDataPanel collapsed state keeps toggle and hides body (0.852416ms)
✔ SensorDataPanel renders into a host container and binds actions (0.695584ms)
✔ package exposes a dedicated TurboWarp integration test command (0.367875ms)
✔ TurboWarp-style URL load registers unsandboxed EV3 blocks without DOM writes (2.224208ms)
✔ TurboWarp-loaded extension drives motors and reads sensor notifications through WeisileLink (3.497333ms)

results.evidence: WeisileLink AI Quest contract, JSON-RPC, and provider tests.
results.label: AI Quest contract, providers, and prediction fallback
results.requirement: AI Quest upload/train/export/predict supports governed raw time-series data and cloud/cached/localFallback prediction modes.

results.evidence: Deployment packaging, EV3 autostart, security review, and 50Hz performance tests.
results.label: Deployment and hardware-readiness assets
results.requirement: EV3SC includes deployment, autostart, performance, and security gates needed before a real EV3 classroom pilot.
